prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: 26C-BLE-WHEAT-SPOONLADLESET-3PC-BUN
Product Type: SPOON
Brand (from catalog): Beille
Existing Title: Beille 3pc Wheat Straw Spoons and Ladle Set Cooking Baking Kitchen Utensils, Cream
Description: Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille 3pc Spoons and Ladle Set, made with sustainable wheat straw! These serving spoons are made with an innovative plant based bioplastic material called wheat straw, that mimics classic kitchen utensils without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic. Stylish and sustainable, who says you can’t have both!
</br></br>
Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels, making them more sustainable and a great zero waste option. The spoons and ladle are of course certified BPA free and food safe for all your cooking, baking and food prep needs; importantly, the set is also dishwasher safe, making for quick and easy clean up!
</br></br>
The kitchen utensils feature sturdy handles made of corrosion resistant stainless steel for durability and longevity in the kitchen. The handles comes with a built in slot for easy hanging storage if desired. The kitchen utensils are finished in a trendy and warm speckled cream color with matte finish, that make them an easy addition to any and all kitchens or food prep stations. 
</br></br>
Every kitchen needs a reliable and durable set of kitchen utensils! With the Beille wheat straw plant based spoons and ladle, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind, knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful materials! Happy cooking!
Search Terms: kitchen utensils set cooking baking supplies tools food meal prep soup ladle spoons punch bowl kitchen starter set serveware wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials chef restaurant equipment wheat straw sustainable products
Features:
- WHEAT STRAW KITCHEN UTENSILS SET: Upgrade your kitchen with these sustainable and stylish wheat straw kitchen utensils from Beille; a must have set for all your cooking, baking and food prep needs
- PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Unique kitchen ladle is made of bioplastic wheat straw, a plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it a more sustainable choice; Innovative material is a great zero waste option and is Certified BPA Free
- SOLID AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw spoons and ladles mimic traditional plastic cooking spoons and utensils without harmful byproducts; all kitchen utensils included in this set are dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients
- STAINLESS STEEL HANDLE: Sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy speckled cream color will fit nicely with any and all kitchens
- SPECIFICATIONS: Spoon Dimensions: 13 x 3 x 1 inches; Ladle Dimensions: 11.5 x 3.5 x 3 inches; Color: Speckled cream; Material: Bioplastic Wheat Straw, Stainless Steel; Set Weight: 0.42lbs

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 3pc Wheat Straw Spoons and Ladle Set Cream

tokens.name: Wheat Straw Spoons and Ladle Set

openai.item_name: Beille 3-pc Cream Spoons and Ladle Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Sustainable Bioplastic, Stainless Steel Handles, Dishwasher Safe, BPA-Free, Hang Storage Slot

openai.title_differentiation: Wheat Straw Bioplastic, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel Handles, Hot And Cold Food Safe, Hanging Slot
